title: Cynanchum revoilii
taxonomy: Cynanchum revoilii is classified within the family Apocynaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family includes various genera such as Plumeria, Mandevilla, and Nerium. Cynanchum revoilii is a genus within this family that is native to Madagascar and is primarily known for its unique and ornamental characteristics. The genus Cynanchum is further divided into numerous species, with Cynanchum revoilii being one of the lesser-known species within this group. Cynanchum revoilii is likely classified within the subfamily Asclepiadoideae, which is a subgroup of Apocynaceae known for its distinctive flowers and unique growth habits.
